hooks.command: codescope-mcp . --auto-index > /dev/null 2>&1 &; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":"Codescope knowledge graph ready. Use MCP tools (search_functions, find_callers, impact_analysis, etc.) for code questions. Slash commands: /codescope, /cs-search, /cs-ask, /cs-stats, /cs-impact"}}'

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":"Reminder: If the user asked about code structure and you read raw files instead of using Codescope MCP tools, suggest using /cs-search or /cs-ask next time for faster results."}}'
